content.en:
"What the hell are you doing?"

The Divine Blade Supreme frowned.

"I didn't want to do anything, I just did business. What I took out were high-grade top-level treasures, in exchange for low-grade innate top-level treasures. From the point of view of trading, trading with me is a big profit! Divine Blade Supreme, how many innate treasures you can take, I can exchange for you as many higher-level treasures, even if you are willing to take out the strongest treasures among the innate treasures, I am willing to trade. If you're not satisfied, we can compensate you with some additional resources, or even some inheritances, how about that?"

Heavenly Grace Supreme Dao.

"What!"

The Divine Blade Supreme was completely shocked.

Such a transaction is simply a loss-making transaction, and it is simply a gift of resources!

"There's a problem, there's definitely a problem!"

Divine Blade Supreme thought to himself.

After being silent for a while, the Divine Blade Supreme said, "Heavenly Grace Supreme, I need to go back and discuss with other Supremes, can I wait for a few days?"

"Yes, but my time is limited, just wait three days, and after three days, if no one comes to trade, I will leave the Heavenly Capital. There are many, many races in the universe, and I have many choices!"

"Understood!"

The Divine Blade Supreme responded.

Wow!

The Divine Blade Supreme dissolved this incarnation and dissipated between heaven and earth.

Looking at the dissipating Divine Blade Supreme Incarnation, the Heavenly Grace Supreme muttered, "Terran, even if you doubt it, under the huge benefits, you will definitely agree!!!"

The cold laughter echoed between heaven and earth, but the people of the Heavenly Capital did not notice it in the slightest.

The other side.

The Divine Blade Supreme was in contact with the other Supremes, and most of the Supremes were summoned, except for a few Supremes who were not out of retreat and were difficult to contact, and the other Supremes were basically present.

meeting.

The Mixed Yuan Supreme asked, "Divine Blade Supreme, what is the matter that summons us?"

The Divine Blade Supreme then appeared in the Heavenly Domain Capital and took out the treasure to trade.

"It's too weird that the Heavenly Grace Supreme of the Twelve Universe Era would come to make such a transaction, isn't it?"

Kunwu Supreme frowned.

The Mixed Yuan Supreme said solemnly: "I heard about this matter not long ago, you should know how many doppelgangers I have, one of which is hidden in the alien race, and there was such a transaction not long ago. However, I have not been in contact with the Supreme of the Twelve Universe Eras, so it is unclear if the deal has been made. Now, such a transaction has taken place not only in our human race, but in all races of the universe. "

"Strange, isn't it a heavy loss for the Supreme of the Twelve Universe Era to trade like this?" said the Divine Blade Supreme curiously.

"There must be a purpose, according to what the Divine Blade Supreme said, the Heavenly Grace Supreme only needs the Innate Supreme Treasure, and in order to exchange for the Innate Supreme Treasure, they are willing to pay a higher price, even several times the price. Therefore, the supremes of the Twelve Universe Epochs must be collecting a large number of innate treasures. It's just that we don't know their intention of collecting the Innate Treasure?"

"Or, instead of exchanging them for the Innate Supreme Treasure, we will directly expel the Heavenly Grace Supreme?"

An ordinary supreme spoke.

"No!" Mixed Yuan Supreme shook his head and said, "This is useless, if you only trade with our Terran family, you can't expel them, and you won't let their purpose be achieved." But now, they trade with all the races of the universe, and it is impossible for every race to withstand the temptation to refuse to trade. According to my guess, most of the races are willing to trade, if not close to all. In this way, our Terrans' refusal to trade will not help. Moreover, judging from the current situation, trading is good for us, just in time to get some of the resources we need from the Supreme of the Twelve Universe Eras. "

"Well, I also agree with the suggestion of the Mixed Yuan Supreme. But after the transaction is successful, we also need to report the situation to the other universe clans, and when the universe races are united, there should be hope to detect the intentions and purposes of the Twelve Universe Era Supremes!" Kungo Supreme suggested.

"Well, so be it. "

Mixed Yuan Supreme Dao.

Next, the Supremes withdrew their incarnations one after another and began to take out the innate treasures stored in the forces.

However, they didn't take out all the innate treasures, and basically one or two of them were just taken out by one or two forces.

Day 3.

The Supremes have come to the Heavenly Capital.

The capital of Celestial.

The Heavenly Grace Supreme sensed the aura of the many supremes of the human race, and smiled slightly: "It's all here!"

He knew that the Terrans must have agreed to the deal.

Sure enough.

When the Terran Supremes came here, they immediately made a deal with the Heavenly Grace Supreme.

After some bargaining, the human race traded with the Heavenly Grace Supreme with eleven innate treasures, and obtained 13 treasures, and the grades of these treasures are very high, one of the innate treasures is the strongest treasure, but the grade is a little low, but in exchange for a very powerful top treasure, it is considered to be a big profit.

In addition, the Heavenly Grace Supreme also gave the Terran seven or eight top-level inheritances and many resources.

"All the supremes of the human race, happy trading, if you still want to trade, you can use this communication jade pendant to contact me!"

The Heavenly Grace Supreme handed over a piece of the Terran Transmission Jade Pendant, and immediately left the Heavenly Capital.

After the Heavenly Grace Supreme left, many supreme beings of the human race looked at the various treasures and resources in their hands, revealing a thoughtful look.

"Everything is true, the Twelve Universe Epochs have paid such a huge price, if there is no purpose, it is simply impossible. Innate Treasure, why did they collect so many Innate Treasures, could it be that the Innate Treasures have other functions that we don't know about?"

The Mixed Yuan Supreme muttered.

"Contact the Protoss and the Demon Race, the Ten Thousand Races Alliance is against the forces of the Twelve Cosmic Eras, the Protoss and the Demon Race are still the main responsible persons, our Human Race is still relatively weak and can't do anything. "Kunwu Supreme Dao.

"Well, let's contact the Protoss and the Demons!"

The other Supremes nodded in response.

In a flash, three months passed.

The entire universe began to be unsettled, all because of the Innate Treasure Trading Event of the Twelve Universe Eras.

And several supremes of the Protoss and the Demon Race also sat together and began to discuss.

The first god lord, the second god lord and the sixth god lord of the god race were present, and the demons were the first demon lord, the third demon race and the fifth demon race present.

A total of six supreme beings started this small meeting.

There is only one content of the meeting - the acquisition of the Innate Treasure by the forces of the Twelve Universe Eras.
